# Mayur Dresses

> Ladies dress pieces shop and wholesale cloth merchant in Mangaldas Market, Mumbai, with over 15 years of trusted service. Unstitched dress materials and salwar suit pieces in cotton, silk, linen, muslin, designer and printed — wholesale and retail, with pan-India delivery.

## Business details
- Name: Mayur Dresses
- Tagline: Always Something New
- Type: Ladies dress pieces shop / wholesale cloth merchant (dress piece)
- Address: 321, 3rd New Lane Corner, Mangaldas Market, Mumbai 400002, Maharashtra, India
- Area: South Mumbai textile hub, near Crawford Market, Kalbadevi and Bhuleshwar
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 98691 50563 (contact: Pratik Jain)
- Email: pjain0769@gmail.com (for enquiries, WhatsApp is preferred)
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM. Closed Sundays.
- Serves: retail customers, boutique owners, resellers and wholesale/bulk buyers

## Products
- Cotton dress pieces — breathable, everyday wear
- Silk dress pieces — weddings, festive and traditional occasions
- Linen dress pieces — comfortable, smart-casual
- Muslin dress pieces — soft, lightweight, graceful drape
- Designer dress pieces — exclusive patterns and detailing
- Printed dress pieces — floral, ethnic, digital and modern prints

## Services
- Wholesale and retail sales at reasonable fixed prices
- Pan-India delivery
- Latest collection shared on WhatsApp on request
